---
name: Refactor request
about: Suggest improvements to prune's code structure or design
title: 'refactor: [Brief description of the refactoring]'
labels: refactor
assignees: ''

---

### Why is this refactoring necessary?
Describe the reason for this refactoring, such as:
- Improving code readability or maintainability
- Reducing complexity or technical debt
- Clarifying the boundary between standalone prune and SoupRune integration

---

### Proposed Refactoring
Explain the specific changes you want to make.

---

### Alternatives Considered
List other approaches and explain why the proposed approach is the best fit.

---

### Additional Information
Provide any extra context, examples, or diagrams that would help explain the refactoring.
